TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_qpiray, title = qpiray, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/qpiray} }

S.FORM: kperay (Squliq Atayal, 賽考利克泰雅語) / qpiray (Skikun Atayal, 四季泰雅語) / tatayu' (Matu'uwal Atayal, 汶水泰雅語) / ṟapiriy (Plngawan Atayal, 萬大泰雅語) / piray (S'uli Atayal, 澤敖利泰雅語) / kpiray (Klesan Atayal, 宜蘭澤敖利泰雅語) tatayu' manananaq ku' suga'iru' nku' tatayu'. aruwa' ku' qamisan ka tikay ru muwah ku' gabagan ka tikay ga, pa'asiga itaal 'i' manahahiyaw 'i' humakay cku' lahulahu ru mickacka cku' pahpah. kiya a' pahpah ga pakakiya a' balaiq talan ka tatayu'. kiya a' tatayu' ga yani uwiy pakakiya' a' mananananaq ka makababaw na' rawrawq. 'i' manbahag cku' rawrawq ku' tatayu' ga, papauwahun nku' rawq ku' giqas na' kinsawkan. kiya mawiwi' cku' babaw na' qusiya' ku' nami'. makahtu' cku' babaw na' qusiya' ku' tunux na' qulih. minga' kahabag ku' qayaban. masiyaq kahabag ku' ma'uba' ka' hamhum. makapahpah kahabag ku' matanah ka pahpah. humuwaag kahabag ku' buweng. yani kahabag san maha', abalaiq ru magbatunux ku' rawrawq. mana'aring 'i' masiulaqi' ku' tatayu' ga, bali' cubalay magbatunux. ini patagtatayu' na ga, 'i' hiya' ga aqih a' talan cubalay ka kakumay. mabihuw 'i' humakay cku' rawq ini ga qarax nku' kahuniq. si'icuwan niya'cu' cuquliq ku' cinalxan niya'. minkakumay ku' tatayu' na ga, aqih gi pakarumakiyas 'i' hiya' ru kahi humuwah cu' pinumuwa'. 'i' hiya' ga aqih a' kakumay. matagtatayu' la ga rumag cku' papatawwaw 'i' pausa' ku' hiing na' buweng. rahuwal ru lalbing ku' buway nku' pinumuwa'. yani rinag nku' tatayu' cku' papatawwaw ka hani. minuwah cku' matagtatayu' ku' kinmagbatunux nku' tatayu'. ani ini ka'ingasug ku' qinqaynux naha' ga asiki na ga manlawkah 'i' maqiyanux. payux cubalay a' tatayu' cku' Taiwan ru baqun kahabag na' itaal cku' babaw na' rawrawq. ini packa' ku' kaal nku' Taiwan kahi payux ku' tatayu' mhniq i' runi. kiya na ku' manananaq ka tatayu' cku' Taiwan. payux ku' ini baqi cu' minuwah inu' ka qumihu ka itaal. muwah 'i' mitaal cu' tatayu' nku' Taiwan. babaw niya' kiya a' riax su' ga aras kahabag ku' qutux su' cu' imuwaag ru usa' cku' tinqalangan na' yencumin mitaal cu' tatayu'. babaqun su' ku' kinusa' na' waw na' tatayu'.

kperay (Squliq Atayal, 賽考利克泰雅語) / qpiray (Skikun Atayal, 四季泰雅語) / tatayu' (Matu'uwal Atayal, 汶水泰雅語) / ṟapiriy (Plngawan Atayal, 萬大泰雅語) / piray (S'uli Atayal, 澤敖利泰雅語) / kpiray (Klesan Atayal, 宜蘭澤敖利泰雅語) tatayu' manananaq ku' suga'iru' nku' tatayu'. aruwa' ku' qamisan ka tikay ru muwah ku' gabagan ka tikay ga, pa'asiga itaal 'i' manahahiyaw 'i' humakay cku' lahulahu ru mickacka cku' pahpah. kiya a' pahpah ga pakakiya a' balaiq talan ka tatayu'. kiya a' tatayu' ga yani uwiy pakakiya' a' mananananaq ka makababaw na' rawrawq. 'i' manbahag cku' rawrawq ku' tatayu' ga, papauwahun nku' rawq ku' giqas na' kinsawkan. kiya mawiwi' cku' babaw na' qusiya' ku' nami'. makahtu' cku' babaw na' qusiya' ku' tunux na' qulih. minga' kahabag ku' qayaban. masiyaq kahabag ku' ma'uba' ka' hamhum. makapahpah kahabag ku' matanah ka pahpah. humuwaag kahabag ku' buweng. yani kahabag san maha', abalaiq ru magbatunux ku' rawrawq. mana'aring 'i' masiulaqi' ku' tatayu' ga, bali' cubalay magbatunux. ini patagtatayu' na ga, 'i' hiya' ga aqih a' talan cubalay ka kakumay. mabihuw 'i' humakay cku' rawq ini ga qarax nku' kahuniq. si'icuwan niya'cu' cuquliq ku' cinalxan niya'. minkakumay ku' tatayu' na ga, aqih gi pakarumakiyas 'i' hiya' ru kahi humuwah cu' pinumuwa'. 'i' hiya' ga aqih a' kakumay. matagtatayu' la ga rumag cku' papatawwaw 'i' pausa' ku' hiing na' buweng. rahuwal ru lalbing ku' buway nku' pinumuwa'. yani rinag nku' tatayu' cku' papatawwaw ka hani. minuwah cku' matagtatayu' ku' kinmagbatunux nku' tatayu'. ani ini ka'ingasug ku' qinqaynux naha' ga asiki na ga manlawkah 'i' maqiyanux. payux cubalay a' tatayu' cku' Taiwan ru baqun kahabag na' itaal cku' babaw na' rawrawq. ini packa' ku' kaal nku' Taiwan kahi payux ku' tatayu' mhniq i' runi. kiya na ku' manananaq ka tatayu' cku' Taiwan. payux ku' ini baqi cu' minuwah inu' ka qumihu ka itaal. muwah 'i' mitaal cu' tatayu' nku' Taiwan. babaw niya' kiya a' riax su' ga aras kahabag ku' qutux su' cu' imuwaag ru usa' cku' tinqalangan na' yencumin mitaal cu' tatayu'. babaqun su' ku' kinusa' na' waw na' tatayu'.
S.PHON: kperaj (s~ɕquliq atajal, *******) / qpiraj (s~ɕkikun atajal, *****) / tatajuʔ (matuʔuwal atajal, *****) / ɾapirij (plŋawan atajal, *****) / piraj (s~ɕʔuli atajal, ******) / kpiraj (kles~ɕan atajal, ********) tatajuʔ manananaq kuʔ s~ɕuɣaʔiruʔ nkuʔ tatajuʔ. aruwaʔ kuʔ qamis~ɕan ka tikaj ru muwaħ kuʔ ɣaβaɣan ka tikaj ɣa, paʔas~ɕiɣa itaal ʔiʔ manaħaħijaw ʔiʔ ħumakaj ʦ~ʨkuʔ laħulaħu ru miʦ~ʨkaʦ~ʨka ʦ~ʨkuʔ paħpaħ. kija aʔ paħpaħ ɣa pakakija aʔ βalaiq talan ka tatajuʔ. kija aʔ tatajuʔ ɣa jani uwij pakakijaʔ aʔ mananananaq ka makaβaβaw naʔ rawrawq. ʔiʔ manβaħaɣ ʦ~ʨkuʔ rawrawq kuʔ tatajuʔ ɣa, papauwaħun nkuʔ rawq kuʔ ɣiqas~ɕ naʔ kins~ɕawkan. kija mawiwiʔ ʦ~ʨkuʔ βaβaw naʔ qus~ɕijaʔ kuʔ namiʔ. makaħtuʔ ʦ~ʨkuʔ βaβaw naʔ qus~ɕijaʔ kuʔ tunux naʔ quliħ. miŋaʔ kaħaβaɣ kuʔ qajaβan. mas~ɕijaq kaħaβaɣ kuʔ maʔuβaʔ kaʔ ħamħum. makapaħpaħ kaħaβaɣ kuʔ matanaħ ka paħpaħ. ħumuwaaɣ kaħaβaɣ kuʔ βuweŋ. jani kaħaβaɣ s~ɕan maħaʔ, aβalaiq ru maɣβatunux kuʔ rawrawq. manaʔariŋ ʔiʔ mas~ɕiulaqiʔ kuʔ tatajuʔ ɣa, βaliʔ ʦ~ʨuβalaj maɣβatunux. ini pataɣtatajuʔ na ɣa, ʔiʔ ħijaʔ ɣa aqiħ aʔ talan ʦ~ʨuβalaj ka kakumaj. maβiħuw ʔiʔ ħumakaj ʦ~ʨkuʔ rawq ini ɣa qarax nkuʔ kaħuniq. s~ɕiʔiʦ~ʨuwan nijaʔʦ~ʨuʔ ʦ~ʨuquliq kuʔ ʦ~ʨinalxan nijaʔ. minkakumaj kuʔ tatajuʔ na ɣa, aqiħ ɣi pakarumakijas~ɕ ʔiʔ ħijaʔ ru kaħi ħumuwaħ ʦ~ʨuʔ pinumuwaʔ. ʔiʔ ħijaʔ ɣa aqiħ aʔ kakumaj. mataɣtatajuʔ la ɣa rumaɣ ʦ~ʨkuʔ papatawwaw ʔiʔ paus~ɕaʔ kuʔ ħiiŋ naʔ βuweŋ. raħuwal ru lalβiŋ kuʔ βuwaj nkuʔ pinumuwaʔ. jani rinaɣ nkuʔ tatajuʔ ʦ~ʨkuʔ papatawwaw ka ħani. minuwaħ ʦ~ʨkuʔ mataɣtatajuʔ kuʔ kinmaɣβatunux nkuʔ tatajuʔ. ani ini kaʔiŋas~ɕuɣ kuʔ qinqajnux naħaʔ ɣa as~ɕiki na ɣa manlawkaħ ʔiʔ maqijanux. pajux ʦ~ʨuβalaj aʔ tatajuʔ ʦ~ʨkuʔ taiwan ru βaqun kaħaβaɣ naʔ itaal ʦ~ʨkuʔ βaβaw naʔ rawrawq. ini paʦ~ʨkaʔ kuʔ kaal nkuʔ taiwan kaħi pajux kuʔ tatajuʔ mħniq iʔ runi. kija na kuʔ manananaq ka tatajuʔ ʦ~ʨkuʔ taiwan. pajux kuʔ ini βaqi ʦ~ʨuʔ minuwaħ inuʔ ka qumiħu ka itaal. muwaħ ʔiʔ mitaal ʦ~ʨuʔ tatajuʔ nkuʔ taiwan. βaβaw nijaʔ kija aʔ riax s~ɕuʔ ɣa aras~ɕ kaħaβaɣ kuʔ qutux s~ɕuʔ ʦ~ʨuʔ imuwaaɣ ru us~ɕaʔ ʦ~ʨkuʔ tinqalaŋan naʔ jenʦ~ʨumin mitaal ʦ~ʨuʔ tatajuʔ. βaβaqun s~ɕuʔ kuʔ kinus~ɕaʔ naʔ waw naʔ tatajuʔ.
